name: Client Operating Model Phase 3 Build MDM Source Authority
outcome_goal: Implement deterministic MDM identity clustering, normalization rules, reversible lineage, freshness/source-authority scoring, typed gaps, and tests on top of Object Truth evidence.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not make LLM judgment the authority for identity merges.
Do not drop source values during normalization.
Do not silently auto-merge ambiguous records.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; note docs requirements in the report.

jobs.label: phase_03_mdm_source_authority_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 3 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_03_mdm_source_authority/PLAN.md. Implement a bounded deterministic MDM substrate using Object Truth evidence: identity cluster contracts and scoring, anti-match signals, reversible source links, normalization rule catalog primitives, freshness scoring, field/source authority evidence, hierarchy/flattening signals, and typed gaps. Keep original source values recoverable. Use tests with fixture records across at least two source systems. Add migrations/operations only when the repo pattern supports them and record live registration needs without applying a broad schema backlog. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_03_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and contracts exposed to Phase 4/5. Do not stage or commit.
